subcodes.first_line: O ye two steadfast, firm and loving brothers! Praise be to God that, like unto the twin stars, ye have risen from the horizon of faith and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر ثابت راسخ مهربان الحمد لله مانند فرقدان از مطلع ایمان و ایقان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
